cast.name: 德莫特·莫根尼斯 Dermot Magennis

introduction: The monarchy has to move with the times, something King Bob and Queen Kat took quite literally. They've moved out of the castle and into a 'normal' house in an ordinary suburb. It's time to show the people that the Royals are just like everyone else. For 13-year-old Princess Stella, moving is the best thing that could happen to her. She has always wanted to live a regular life, go to a real school and just blend in. But blending in is not easy when you have no idea how ordinary things are done. Will Stella, her sister Molly, their parents and pets manage to combine state dinners and opening speeches with cooking, football practice and cleaning the house?. Can Stella's new friends Mia and Freya help her survive school plays, crushes and the cool crowds? Whatever happens, they're certainly going to make a ROYAL effort.
